author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: vendor 18 skills from ~/.claude/skills/ into crosslink/resources/claude/skills/ (deleting the redundant rust-gpu-discipline.skill ZIP archive). Add generate_skills_file() in build.rs that recursively walks the dir and emits skills_gen.rs with one include_str!() const per file plus a SKILL_FILES tuple array. Walker is defensive: skips non-UTF-8 files with a cargo:warning so future binary assets don't break the build. In init/mod.rs, include skills_gen.rs and add a deploy loop alongside the existing commands deploy that creates .claude/skills/<name>/ subdirs and writes each file. Mirror the pattern in managed_files() so --update tracks skills via the manifest. Add test_init_deploys_claude_skills integration test asserting both single-file skills (architect, commit, etc.) and the multi-file rust-gpu-discipline skill land correctly.
